name: send_push_notification
description: Send a push notification to mobile devices and web browsers using Pusher Beams. Target notifications to specific users by their user IDs or to interests (topics) that users have subscribed to. Supports Apple Push Notification service (APNs) for iOS, Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) for Android, and Web Push for browsers. Each platform has its own payload format within the request. Use this for mobile alerts, breaking news, order updates, and re-engagement notifications.

parameters.name: instance_id
parameters.description: Your Pusher Beams instance ID. This is a path parameter in the URL. Found in your Pusher dashboard under Beams.

parameters.name: users
parameters.description: Array of user IDs to send the notification to. Maximum 1000 users per request. Users must have been associated with their device via the Beams client SDK.

parameters.name: apns
parameters.description: Apple Push Notification service payload. Contains 'aps' object with 'alert' (title/body), 'badge', 'sound', and optional custom data.

parameters.name: fcm
parameters.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging payload. Contains 'notification' object with 'title', 'body', 'icon', and optional 'data' object for custom key-value pairs.

parameters.name: web
parameters.description: Web Push notification payload. Contains 'notification' object with 'title', 'body', 'icon', 'deep_link' (URL to open on click).

alert.title: Order Shipped!
alert.body: Your order #ORD-8847 has shipped via UPS. Estimated delivery: March 5.

notification.title: Order Shipped!
notification.body: Your order #ORD-8847 has shipped via UPS. Estimated delivery: March 5.

notification.title: Order Shipped!
notification.body: Your order #ORD-8847 has shipped via UPS. Estimated delivery: March 5.
